decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of spells and abilities from the Izzet Control archetype. The deck focuses on card advantage, mana efficiency, and removing threats from the opponent's side of the field. It utilizes cards like Combustion Technique, Firebending Lesson, and Accumulate Wisdom to maintain control of the game. Additionally, it includes cards like Gran-Gran and Iroh's Demonstration for additional value and protection. The goal is to outvalue the opponent and eventually win through card advantage and strategic plays.

The main idea of this deck is to use a combination of control spells and land manipulation to control the board and outvalue opponents. By utilizing cards such as Stock Up, Consult the Star Charts, and Jeskai Revelation, the player can draw cards, generate resources, and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of cards like Duress, Sear, and Deadly Cover-Up provides additional control options, while land cards like Riverpyre Verge and Great Hall of the Biblioplex help fix mana and generate additional value. Ultimately, the goal is to outlast the opponent and win through attrition.

The main idea of this deck is to have multiple control options to manipulate and disrupt your opponent's strategies. With a variety of removal spells, counter spells, and card draw options, this deck aims to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent. By utilizing a combination of controlling spells like Day of Judgment and Inevitable Defeat, card draw like Tablet of Discovery and Consult the Star Charts, and versatile threats like Lightning Helix and Jeskai Revelation, this deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent until victory is achieved.

This deck focuses on quick, aggressive plays utilizing cheap spells and creatures in order to deal damage early and often. Utilizing a combination of burn spells, card draw, and versatile creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to set up their game plan. By utilizing efficient cards and maintaining a high tempo throughout the game, the deck can outpace and outmaneuver slower, more controlling decks to secure a victory. The key to success lies in maintaining pressure and adapting to different board states quickly and effectively.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. By utilizing cards like Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique, you can efficiently deal with threats on the board while also drawing additional cards to maintain card advantage. Monument to Endurance and Abandon Attachments provide additional control elements, allowing you to dictate the pace of the game. Additionally, cards like Iroh's Demonstration and Quantum Riddler provide versatility and disruption to outmaneuver your opponent. Overall, the deck aims to outlast and outplay your opponent through efficient control strategies.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to flood the board with aggressive creatures and use combat tricks and buffs to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The deck focuses on early game ramp with cards like Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge to play powerful creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker. Practiced Offense and Seam Rip provide additional ways to push through damage, while cards like Pawpatch Recruit and Abandoned Air Temple ensure a consistent flow of threats. Surrak, Elusive Hunter adds resilience and versatility to the deck's game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and combat tricks. By using cards like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker, and Pawpatch Recruit to apply early pressure, backed up by Practiced Offense and Seam Rip to pump up the team, this deck aims to maintain a strong board presence and close out the game quickly. Support cards like Multiversal Passage and Hushwood Verge help ensure the right mana is available for the deck's powerful threats, such as Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Brightglass Gearhulk.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing a combination of spells and creatures to quickly fill the graveyard, then bringing back powerful creatures through reanimation spells. The deck includes cards that help draw and discard cards, control the opponent's hand, and protect key pieces. By efficiently executing the combo, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and strategic plays.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize a mix of creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. By using cards that provide extra resources or card advantage, such as Helping Hand and Quantum Riddler, the deck aims to maintain a strong board presence and keep up the pressure. Additionally, the inclusion of evasive creatures like Sage of the Skies and Momo, Friendly Flier helps to ensure consistent damage output. Overall, the deck focuses on tempo and efficient use of resources to secure a victory.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and combat tricks. With cards like Pawpatch Recruit and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker, the deck aims to consistently put pressure on the opponent early in the game. Practiced Offense and Seam Rip provide additional ways to buff creatures and push through damage. The inclusion of cards like Multiversal Passage and Temple Garden ensures mana consistency, allowing for a smooth and aggressive gameplay. The deck aims to win the game quickly through efficient creature combat and aggressive tactics.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build a strong board presence through efficient creature drops and pump spells, enabling fast and aggressive gameplay. By utilizing cards like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker, Pawpatch Recruit, and Hushwood Verge, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of early game aggression and mid-game power spikes. Practiced Offense and Erode serve as removal and combat tricks to push through damage and clear the way for attacks. The deck also includes some utility cards like Multiversal Passage and Badgermole Cub to provide versatility and support the overall aggro strategy.

The key concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast, aggressive strategy utilizing a mix of efficient creatures and combat tricks. By utilizing cards like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Brightglass Gearhulk, this deck aims to quickly build a board presence and maintain pressure on the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Practiced Offense and Seam Rip helps to push through damage and close out the game swiftly. With a focus on efficient creatures and combat tricks, this deck aims to win through early aggression and tempo advantage.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm opponents quickly with a variety of low-cost creatures and aggressive spells. The combination of mana ramp from Llanowar Elves and powerful creatures like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Pawpatch Recruit allow for early game pressure. The deck also includes cards like Practiced Offense and Seam Rip to maintain board control and deal additional damage. Additionally, support from cards like Abandoned Air Temple and Multiversal Passage provide flexibility in both offense and defense. Overall, the deck aims to establish a strong and fast-paced presence on the battlefield.

The key concept of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain control of the game through a combination of removal spells, card draw, and powerful creatures. By utilizing cards like Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent to draw cards, and effects like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique to deal with threats, the deck aims to outlast opponents and eventually overwhelm them with powerful creatures like Gran-Gran and Quantum Riddler. The deck also includes some burn spells like It'll Quench Ya! to provide additional reach and finish off opponents.

This UW Control deck focuses on maintaining board control through a mix of removal spells and counterspells, while also utilizing card draw and manipulation to outvalue the opponent. The deck includes cards that can exile or destroy threats, as well as cards that can draw additional resources to help maintain control. By effectively managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, this deck aims to outlast its opponent and eventually win through card advantage and powerful finishers.

This Bant Aggro deck focuses on utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By combining cards that generate mana with powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Bloom Tender, the deck aims to maintain a consistent stream of threats. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Seam Rip and Stormchaser's Talent to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of cards like The Jolly Balloon Man and Mockingbird provide additional utility and flexibility to adapt to different situations. The deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain that momentum throughout the game.
